summary: Key evidence for whether Metaculus CP on Mamdani winning NYC mayor will be above 91% on Sep 24
content: Mamdani won Dem primary July 1. 4-way polls: Mamdani 43-46%, Cuomo 24-28%, Sliwa 10-15%, Adams 7-9%. Head-to-head vs Cuomo: 48-44% (tight). Kalshi at 79% as of Sep 3. Cuomo announced independent run Sep 10. 91% threshold is high. Estimated CP range 78-88%. Probability CP>91%: ~25%.
